nasb.text: And Moses brought the people out of the camp to meet God, and they stood at the foot of the mountain.

esv.text: Then Moses brought the people out of the camp to meet God, and they took their stand at the foot of the mountain.

cnv.text: 摩西率領人民出營去迎接　神，他們都站在山下。

ccb.text: 摩西率领百姓出营迎接上帝，他们都站在山脚下。
